auth_detection_signals: No login form visible on page
notes: Always run auth setup before any dashboard tests. Store session token for reuse across tests in this suite.

page_html_snippet: Contact Us
auth_detection_signals: No Authorization header in form submission
notes: No auth needed. Test form validation, submission, and success state.

test_plan_step: Add an item to the cart and checkout
auth_detection_signals: Add to cart works without auth
Checkout page redirects to login if not authenticated
Cart persists in localStorage for guests but not in DB

flow_steps: Fill payment details (use Stripe test card 4242 4242 4242 4242)

notes: Two-part flow: add-to-cart is public, checkout requires auth. Use Stripe test mode, never real payment cards in tests.

test_plan_step: Create a new workspace as admin

recommended_setup.note: Regular user will receive 403. Must use admin role.

notes: Admin-only action. If role-based access control is being tested, also create a non-admin user to verify they receive 403 on this endpoint.

test_plan_step: View the public homepage and verify hero text
page_html_snippet:
Welcome to SpecPilot

Automated UI testing powered by AI

Get Started
notes: No setup needed. Simple content verification test. Good candidate for smoke testing.

test_plan_step: Filter bills by policy area on the BillWatch dashboard
auth_detection_signals: Bill list loads for anonymous users (public data)
Filtering and saving preferences requires login
notes: Basic filtering works without auth. Login to test follow/save functionality. May need to mock Congress.gov API for test isolation.

test_plan_step: Open /login and verify the submit button is enabled
page_html_snippet: <form id='login-form'><input name='email' type='email'><input name='password' type='password'><button type='submit'>Sign in</button></form>
auth_detection_signals: Page itself is the login route
No redirect required to access page
No protected data rendered before auth
notes: This is a pre-auth page. Treat as public form validation flow.

auth_detection_signals: Profile mutation endpoint requires user identity
notes: Keep setup minimal and verify post-save toast for success.

test_plan_step: Open the report settings drawer and enable weekly digest
auth_detection_signals: Authenticated user context needed for persistence

login_steps: Log in as the test user

notes: This is a lightweight authenticated preference flow, good for smoke coverage.
